text: Which of the below is *not* included in a CSR (Continuous Synopsis Record)?

options.text: Flag under which ship is registered

explanation: The Continuous Synopsis Record (CSR), mandated by SOLAS, contains a permanent record of the ship's history, including flag, name, IMO number, owner, and classification society. While the SSO is a critical security role, their personal name is not an element required to be on the CSR, which focuses on ship and company details.
